'''Qurang Lah''' was a male [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warrior and a crèche-brother of [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]].

==Biography==
Lah commanded [[Battle of Yag'Dhul (26 ABY)|the attack]] on the [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]] system. However, Qurang initially opposed the assault, as it would be better to hold the present "truce" for the moment so that the Yuuzhan Vong could reorder their forces. He was suspicious of [[Nom Anor]] when the [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Executor]] claimed that the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] ([[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], [[Tahiri Veila]], and [[Anakin Solo]]) killed the rest of the warriors when in fact the [[Intendant caste|Intendant]] did it himself so the other Yuuzhan Vong would not find out he had backed down from a challenge by one of the Jedi. The Yuuzhan Vong fleet was forced to withdraw when the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Second Battle of Sernpidal|attacked]] the shipwomb at [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
